canonical_name: Scheme for Innovations for Defence Excellence (iDEX)
funding_evidence: Maximum grant up to Rs 1.5 crore per applicant in the official Scheme for iDEX PDF.
status_evidence: Official iDEX scheme identity; no permanent application window is inferred.

canonical_name: ADITI (Acing Development of Innovative Technologies with iDEX)
funding_evidence: ADITI grant up to 50 percent of product development budget with a maximum of Rs 25 crore per winner.
status_evidence: Official ADITI scheme identity; dated challenge editions are listed separately.

canonical_name: SPARK – Support for Prototype and Research Kickstart in Defence
funding_evidence: SPARK funding mechanism supports selected iDEX challenge applicants through milestone-based assistance up to Rs 1.5 crore.
status_evidence: Official iDEX guideline index identifies SPARK as the prototype and research kick-start framework.
